attributes.description: Insider-threat-focused view of Windows Explorer ShellBags parsed by SBECmd. Surfaces network-share browsing, removable / non-primary drive access, possibly deleted folders, and confirmed user-explored navigation. Use alongside the LNK, MFT, and EVTX KAPE dashboards for a full timeline.

attributes.title: Shellbags — Insider Threat
